items.title: Rectified Linear Units Improve Restricted Boltzmann Machines (Nair & Hinton, 2010)
items.author: Vinod Nair, Geoffrey E. Hinton
items.note: Seminal paper introducing ReLU as a practical activation that trains faster than sigmoid for deep models.

items.title: ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks (Krizhevsky et al., 2012)
items.author: Alex Krizhevsky, Ilya Sutskever, Geoffrey E. Hinton
items.note: AlexNet used ReLU in hidden layers, demonstrating large-scale GPU training benefits over tanh.

items.title: Delving Deep into Rectifiers: Surpassing Human-Level Performance on ImageNet (He et al., 2015)
items.author: Kaiming He, Xiangyu Zhang, Shaoqing Ren, Jian Sun
items.note: Introduces PReLU and He initialization designed for ReLU-family activations.

items.title: Deep Learning (Goodfellow, Bengio, Courville) — Chapter 6
items.author: Ian Goodfellow, Yoshua Bengio, Aaron Courville
items.note: Covers activation functions including ReLU, properties of piecewise linear units, and hidden-layer design.

items.title: PyTorch nn.ReLU documentation
items.author: PyTorch Team
items.note: Reference implementation and inplace option for ReLU in training pipelines.
